name: zrndr_init_globals
description: zRndr::InitGlobals resets renderer globals, perspective/fog defaults, framebuffer mirrors, and graphics flag option binding.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zRndr::InitGlobals: 316 unmasked mismatches after masking 257 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 474 bytes and the VC object body is 608 bytes.

The reviewed byte drift is broad initialization/source-shape drift, including helper-call materialization for exact float-bit constants and global store ordering; the native smoke verifies renderer global resets, perspective defaults, fog defaults, framebuffer mirrors, blit callback identity, and graphics flag option binding.
